cases.title: Geography in the promo builder
cases.metric: Freed up ~2 hours a week for managers
cases.description: Prevented the team from building an unnecessarily complex solution. Managers stopped manually adding every new dark store to dozens of city promotions.
cases.coverAlt: Promo builder screen with geography settings

cases.title: CRM for call center operators
cases.description: Full-cycle redesign of a product with heavy legacy debt. The transition went smoothly with no user training — it used to take weeks.
cases.coverAlt: CRM screen for call center operators

cases.title: App for long-haul truckers
cases.metric: Launched a new product line from scratch
cases.description: Designed the company's first app as an MVP in a week to test the hypothesis. A survey showed the interface was clear — drivers had no issues using it.
cases.coverAlt: Mobile app screen for long-haul truckers

cases.title: Design system for a logistics company
cases.metric: 30+ components · 5 products · rebrand in a sprint
cases.description: Made the system alive and functional. The team stopped re-arguing the same decisions. Time spent on routine screens dropped noticeably.
cases.coverAlt: Design system components for a logistics company
